title: poa sphondylodes subsp. subtrivialis
intro: Poa sphondylodes subsp. subtrivialis is a subspecies of grass native to China, often referred to as a type of grass or wild grass. The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and treating digestive issues. The plant is prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and dried extracts, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
